visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of a young man in a dimly lit, blue-green environment. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a dark t-shirt. A silver watch is visible on his left wrist. He holds a phone to his right ear with his right hand, his expression serious and contemplative. The background is dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor or nighttime setting. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. A man speaks in a low, somber, and weary voice, his tone filled with a sense of resignation and melancholy. He speaks slowly, as if deep in thought, saying, "你现在人都在这儿了" (You're all here now). The camera remains steady, maintaining the tight focus on the man's face as his expression shifts slightly, his eyes looking down and to the side. The lighting and setting are unchanged. New white Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen as he continues, "还可以做得了什么？" (What else can be done?). The shot stays on the man's face. He continues to hold the phone to his ear, his gaze still directed downward. The
